From our sister site, The New Stack

Developer-Led Observability: Debugging Distributed and AI Systems

Observability is shifting from an operations chore to a developer superpower, putting real-time telemetry directly into the hands of the engineers building the code. Join this webinar to:

  • Shift-Left Debugging: Use runtime telemetry to catch and resolve production issues earlier in the lifecycle without the need to redeploy.
  • Master AI Signals: Make sense of massive data volumes across logs and traces to understand how AI systems perform in real environments.
  • Build a Culture of Ownership: Integrate monitoring-as-code and practical instrumentation patterns into your everyday development workflow.
Register Today

Developer-Led Observability: Debugging Distributed and AI Systems

Observability is shifting from an operations chore to a developer superpower, putting real-time telemetry directly into the hands of the engineers building the code. Join this webinar to:

- Shift-Left Debugging: Use runtime telemetry to catch and resolve production issues earlier in the lifecycle without the need to redeploy.
- Master AI Signals: Make sense of massive data volumes across logs and traces to understand how AI systems perform in real environments.
- Build a Culture of Ownership: Integrate monitoring-as-code and practical instrumentation patterns into your everyday development workflow.
